name: Team Hern
subject: fwd: Keep the pressure on!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
See where we stand. Tap or click >>>
Hey Peter, Kevin sent out an important message recently on our February end-of-month drive. If you missed it, you can read it below now. **The bottom line is[we need your urgent help](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/24d757b8a8a84851/169cdb80c3962015c3d6b838967d376c/34143), to fuel our fight to STOP the Democrats’ extreme left-wing agenda make Washington more accountable to the American people!** The weeks ahead are going to be EXTREMELY busy. That’s why this effort to close out the month strong is so important. _We still need to raise another $4,305 to reach our goal, and time is running out fast._ **[Follow this link to pitch in $5, $10, $25, or $50, or more if you can](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/24d757b8a8a84851/34ae0e4355ac3c74c3d6b838967d376c/34143)**. Every contribution is a huge help, Peter. Every dollar we raise helps us get out my message and rally Oklahomans to stand up for life, liberty, and our conservative values. We know times are tough – ANY contribution you can send is greatly appreciated. With Big Tech trying to silence conservative voices and the mainstream media treating Joe Biden with kid gloves, we’re up against a lot. We must stand united in this fight! **[Tap or click to rush critical support>>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/24d757b8a8a84851/5df50ce661a9ad18c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** \- Team Hern | |
---
From: Kevin Hern <info@hernforcongress.com>
Date: Thursday, February 25, 2021 at 2:05 PM
To: Top Supporters
Subject: Keep the pressure on!
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/24d757b8a8a84851/543539363b9706c6c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
Dear Peter,

We’re getting ready to close out the first full month since President Biden took office, and I need your help to keep fighting for conservative principles in Oklahoma and across America.

I’m working hard to bring accountability and positive change to Washington with commonsense reforms like term limits, ensuring you aren't forced to unionize, eliminating ear marks, giving officials enough time to actually read bills, and more.

With Biden and his team of radical leftists pushing hard and fast to fundamentally transform America, it is critical that we fight back before it’s too late!

We need to keep the pressure on to ensure our American values remain intact. If you value your freedom and liberty, please chip in what you can right now to help me fight for it.
[**CHIP IN $5 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/24d757b8a8a84851/70fec8fc074173e2c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
[**CHIP IN $15 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/24d757b8a8a84851/1a5201292c8f02fcc3d6b838967d376c/34143)
[**CHIP IN $35 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/24d757b8a8a84851/ece37b821c01d8c7c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
[**CHIP IN $50 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/24d757b8a8a84851/b067674ef894b803c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
[**CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/24d757b8a8a84851/1573d6327e568ecbc3d6b838967d376c/34143)
We can never back down in the fight to save America. There will always be those who value their own power over preserving the principles that make our country great.

But if we stand and work together, we can’t lose.

Thanks for continuing the fight with me,

Kevin Hern
[**MAKE A DONATION >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/24d757b8a8a84851/685819964958bb5ac3d6b838967d376c/34143)

name: WI SCHOOLS Alert
subject: We have to PAY bureaucrats to KEEP SCHOOLS CLOSED??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Biden's Bailout Keeps Getting Worse! PeterI wouldn't have believed it if I didn't see it with my own eyes.Joe Biden's $1.9 trillion bailout includes one of the [worst ideas I've ever seen](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mqdtdd-ahkdjtlkr-r/): a provision to PAY D.C. bureaucrats $1,400 EVERY WEEK to stay at home and _not work_ if their child's school is remote. **NO. **This is the kind of liberal insanity I was elected to stand up to.Will you **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mqdtdd-ahkdjtlkr-y/)** to fight this horrible idea and demand that we** [OPEN OUR SCHOOLS](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mqdtdd-ahkdjtlkr-j/)?** [[YES I WILL] - END THE BUREAUCRAT BAILOUT AND OPEN OUR SCHOOLS](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mqdtdd-ahkdjtlkr-t/) Not only is paying bureaucrats to keep their kids home unfair to the taxpayers, it's actually an **incentive to keep schools closed!** These backward liberals need to listen to their own CDC:
> "Opening schools for in-person learning as safely and quickly as possible, and keeping them open, **is important given the many known and established benefits of in-person learning. "**
[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mqdtdd-ahkdjtlkr-i/) **[Please, c](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mqdtdd-ahkdjtlkr-d/)**[**lick here to sign the petition to OPEN OUR SCHOOLS and END THE BUREAUCRAT BAILOUT!**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mqdtdd-ahkdjtlkr-h/) \- Congressman Scott Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mqdtdd-ahkdjtlkr-k/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mqdtdd-ahkdjtlkr-u/) Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-mqdtdd-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-o) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-u-mqdtdd-ahkdjtlkr-b/)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: 480 Donors needed before Sunday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
My February fundraising deadline is in a little more than 24 hours - and if we're going to hit our important financial goals, we need your help. _We'd hate to see you go but if you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWUHVr8dxN)****_

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57522498:WUHVr8dxN:m:1:2247059263:F2133544439D349584E08A74B3ACA47F:r)
---
**February Fundraising Deadline Approaching: Our February fundraising deadline is in a little more than 24 hours. Between now and then we're looking for 480 conservatives to step up and donate $10 or more to help us reach our important financial goals. **
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57522498:WUHVr8dxN:m:1:2247059263:F2133544439D349584E08A74B3ACA47F:r)

Peter,

In just a little more than a month in office, Joe Biden has issued more than 40 wide-ranging executive orders and actions! That's more than any other previous president at this point in their term.

Even worse...under Biden and Democrats in Congress:
* Schools are still closed
* The Keystone pipeline has been canceled
* Our borders have been opened to illegal immigration
* Democrats are negotiating with Iran
* And now they're spending $1.9 trillion on a so-called COVID bill that is chock full of spending to benefit Washington special interests instead of the American people

If any of the above strikes a chord with you - or gives you cause for concern - then **[we're asking you to chip-in whatever you can to help us meet our February end-of-month fundraising goal](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57522498:WUHVr8dxN:m:1:2247059263:F2133544439D349584E08A74B3ACA47F:r)**. We need all of the help we can muster if we're going to win back the House, and**_it's never too early_** to start funding our efforts.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57522498:WUHVr8dxN:m:1:2247059263:F2133544439D349584E08A74B3ACA47F:r)

Now that Democrats control the White House - and narrow majorities in both the House and Senate - the mainstream media isn't paying attention (**have they ever?**) to the disastrous policies being implemented through executive orders, or out-of-control spending bills being pushed through Congress with little to no time for debate.

That leaves conservatives like me and my team with the duty to make sure Americans know how harmful the progressive-left's agenda really is; **it's up to us to make the case that Democrats cannot be trusted with power.**

**Until Republicans can regain a majority in either the House or the Senate** , Democrats will continue to treat us as though we're a temporary roadblock standing in the way of their radical reform agenda.

**[I know you're tired of endless campaigning, we are too. But to stop Biden and the Democrats we have to start laying the groundwork for our 2022 comeback TODAY.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57522498:WUHVr8dxN:m:1:2247059263:F2133544439D349584E08A74B3ACA47F:r)**

Our February fundraising deadline is in a little more than 24 hours. Between now and then **[we're looking for 480 conservatives to step up and donate $10 or more to help us reach our important financial goals](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57522498:WUHVr8dxN:m:1:2247059263:F2133544439D349584E08A74B3ACA47F:r)**.

Can we count you in?

If you stand against higher taxes, immigrant caravans, and the destruction of private business through forced lockdowns, then we're asking you to show your support for our efforts before midnight this Sunday.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57522498:WUHVr8dxN:m:1:2247059263:F2133544439D349584E08A74B3ACA47F:r)

For freedom,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57522498:WUHVr8dxN:m:1:2247059263:F2133544439D349584E08A74B3ACA47F:r)
Jim Jordan

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Peter,
As we mentioned in our last email, instead of our traditional end-of-month goal, we wanted to give you a choice on how your money will be spent. Right now we believe that whatever we raise will have the most impact by either going towards our Defeat Bill Lee Fund or our New Website Fund.
We have until midnight tomorrow – will you make a donation right now and show us which is most important to you?
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailws [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailws] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemail [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemail]
We’re doing everything we can, working towards turning Tennessee blue, but we can’t do it without you. If you’d prefer to donate towards our traditional end-of-month goal, please click the donate button below.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Thank you,
Hendrell Remus
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

body:
I'm reaching out on behalf of my colleague, Cathy McMorris Rodgers
Friend,

I'm reaching out on behalf of my colleague, Cathy McMorris Rodgers, to ask for your help. She is up against a tight fundraising deadline and she is still behind on her goal for the month.

Despite all of our top critics' expectations, we've continued to fend off political attacks from Democrats in battleground districts.

clean_body: I'm reaching out on behalf of my colleague, Cathy McMorris Rodgers Friend, I'm reaching out on behalf of my colleague, Cathy McMorris Rodgers, to ask for your help. She is up against a tight fundraising deadline and she is still behind on her goal for the month. Despite all of our top critics' expectations, we've continued to fend off political attacks from Democrats in battleground districts. But the Democrats ' smear campaigns are targeting individual conservatives who are willing to speak out against their ultra-progressive policies, == I am confident that Cathy can defend her seat from Nancy Pelosi's big-money interest groups with some help from grassroots supporters like yourself. == == == == == == Nancy Pelosi and her left wing caucus still control the House of Representatives, and if she gets her way, this nation will feel the effects of her disastrous policies for decades to come. You have the chance to do something about it--== Thank you, Dan Crenshaw ** Paid for by McMorris Rodgers Win The Future Fund PO Box 2485 Springfield, VA 22152 == | | McMorris Rodgers | PO Box 2485, Springfield, VA 22152 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Moms Guide to Running 101
subject: ICYMI: It's not too late to join us TODAY to talk about running for office
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice?refcode=email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice?refcode=email][https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/EA/EA007/1/88265/images/IMG_3565.jpeg]You're invited!
Please join Simona Grace and Elisa Cardnell as we talk about what goes into the decision to run for office and what those first steps look like.
While we'll cover a few things that are unique to being a mom running for office, everyone is welcome to attend. We'll have future sessions on more in-depth topics like fundraising and building your campaign's brand.
Date: February 27, 2021
Time: 6pm EST/3pm PST
Location: Zoom
This is a free event. Contributions before or during the event [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice?refcode=0225] are voluntary and will help Moms in Office support these events and moms running for office.
RSVP [https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZwkf-irqT4tHNBXF4R6KprpOsMRd70YvXVz]
Moms in Office
13351 Riverside Drive
#265
Sherman Oaks, CA 91423
United States

clean_body: If the last month has shown us anything, it's this: we have to start fighting back == Friend, Our Conservative values are at risk -- not just in my home state of Arkansas, but nationwide. In the last thirty days, President Biden has sided with corrupt Teachers Unions, green new dealers, and radical coastal elites at every turn. == President Biden's embrace of their radical beliefs is keeping our kids out of school, eliminating MILLIONS of good-paying jobs, and selling out hard-working Americans to China. == I'm on the front lines of this fight, Friend. I'm fighting to protect the NRA AND to fight back against President Biden's illegal executive actions. But I cannot get much further without your immediate support. | TEAM RUTLEDGE END-OF-MONTH DEADLINE | == DONATION: PENDING | == | | == | == | | == | == | | == I'm the conservative fighter that Arkansas has always been able to count on. Please, help Michelle hit her goal so she can work for you and help get America back on track. ==** It's an uphill battle, but with your help, we can make it happen. Thank you, Team Steel With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

Pete may be running for Governor of Virginia, _but this is bigger than just Virginia, Friend_. Conservative governors across the country are our last line of defense against radical left policies coming from Washington, D.C., and right now Virginia is doomed with Northam at the helm.

It's crucial Republicans take back Virginia, and Pete Snyder is our best chance. He is a disruptor and small business owner that is passionate about saving his community. That is why when the coronavirus pandemic hit Virginia, Pete didn't hesitate for a second to start helping his community.

We need THAT type of leadership in Richmond to defend us from the radical left's agenda. Without a true conservative champion in Richmond, we don't stand a chance.

clean_body: We've got less than 48 hours left... &zwnj == == Friend, == | == The last day of February is tomorrow, so we need all the help we can get to take a firm stand against the radical Left's attacks in Virginia and across the country. == == Remember Friend, the Democrats control Washington, D.C. now, so our only hope at getting this country back on the right track is to elect as many conservative governors around the country as possible. == Thank you, Team Pete Campaign HQ \------------------Begin Forwarded Message------------------ Friend, == http:// == Pete may be running for Governor of Virginia, but this is bigger than just Virginia, Friend. Conservative governors across the country are our last line of defense against radical left policies coming from Washington, D.C., and right now Virginia is doomed with Northam at the helm. It's crucial Republicans take back Virginia, and Pete Snyder is our best chance. He is a disruptor and small business owner that is passionate about saving his community. That is why when the coronavirus pandemic hit Virginia, Pete didn't hesitate for a second to start helping his community. We need THAT type of leadership in Richmond to defend us from the radical left's agenda. Without a true conservative champion in Richmond, we don't stand a chance. == | == | == | == | == | == | == Pete is ready to shake up the status quo, and take a stand against the Democrats' radical, socialist agenda. == http:// Thank you, Alerts via Team Pete Get involved with Team Pete Today! ****
Friend,
This is New Jersey Republican Congressman Jeff Van Drew. I'm proudly AMERICA FIRST, and I have something to share that should scare us all.
Radical Democrats in the states are threatening to ERASE every last accomplishment we've achieved these last four years. If these socialists are able to overtake our America First majorities in upcoming special elections across the country, it means doom for everything we've fought for to keep our country great.
Republicans in the states have a CRITICAL end of month fundraising deadline on SUNDAY. If they are going to be able to hold on, then they need to reach their goal.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. clean_body: This needs your attention ** Friend, This is New Jersey Republican Congressman Jeff Van Drew. I'm proudly AMERICA FIRST, and I have something to share that should scare us all. Radical Democrats in the states are threatening to ERASE every last accomplishment we've achieved these last four years. If these socialists are able to overtake our America First majorities in upcoming special elections across the country, it means doom for everything we've fought for to keep our country great. Republicans in the states have a CRITICAL end of month fundraising deadline on SUNDAY. If they are going to be able to hold on, then they need to reach their goal. Every dollar given to Republicans in the states before MIDNIGHT will be 5x MATCHED to ensure they have what it takes to WIN. == SUPPORT OUR AMERICA FIRST MAJORITIES == == == == In 2019, I left the Democratic Party and became a registered Republican. I REFUSED to be loyal to the radical party of Ilhan Omar and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and today, I'm determined to STOP that party from controlling our state legislatures. With special elections rapidly approaching, State Republicans need everything they can to WIN. == Thank you, Jeff Van Drew Congressman (NJ-02) == To visit our website's about page, click ==. To make a secure, online contribution to support our critical mission, click ==. You can contribute via mail at the address below. Your input is critical to our success. id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t
---
| Hoosier Republican,

The Biden Administration’s disastrous policies are already putting all the progress our country has made over the last four years at risk. But that isn’t stopping them from claiming President Trump and Vice President Pence’s victories as their own.

The previous administration spent months working non-stop to help America recover from the COVID pandemic, and instituted policies that allowed a COVID vaccine to be created, tested, approved, and administered in record time. **In fact, almost 1 million vaccines have already been administered here in Indiana!**

Instead of thanking Trump and Pence for their hard work, President Biden continues to talk down on their efforts, and claim the continuing decrease in case numbers and increasing vaccination rates for his own.

You and I both know, Hoosier Republican, that the success our country is seeing is built upon the foundation that Trump and Pence’s leadership built – NOT the radical left’s socialist agenda.

**We need STRONG Republican leadership in Washington if we ever want to regain the majority, and it all starts now**.
---

2020 threw everything it possibly could at Indiana to set us back.

**But Hoosiers know a thing or two about making incredible comebacks –– even when the odds are stacked against us. **

It’s why the greatest comeback movie of all time is __Hoosiers!__

**Under Governor Holcomb’s leadership, Indiana is already coming back and rebuilding stronger than ever in the wake of COVID-19.**

Peter,

Here’s the situation.

Now that Democrats control the Senate and Nancy Pelosi still has control of the House, they are unleashing their radical agenda on America! Just take a look at what their agenda would do to small businesses.

_**The Democrat’s Anti-Small Business agenda: **_

_❌ Mandate $15/Hour Minimum Wage, which will crush small businesses! _
_❌ Refuse to Pass Emergency Funding for Restaurants and Bars, the hardest hit by the pandemic!_
_❌ Allow PPP Loans meant for small businesses to be used by Planned Parenthood & Public Sector Unions!_

**Peter, as long as Democrats are in control in Washington, small businesses will never be safe.** We’ve already seen many Democrats support the same lockdowns and restrictions that put small businesses in this position in the first place, and now they’re effectively destroying them through legislation.

**But, I’m not going to let that happen, and here’s why:**

**__[> > We’re going to be Nancy Pelosi’s WORST NIGHTMARE! <<](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=efe55b7f38e84b929a3327e7488ac24e&_e=8x3fHG06NtVMceFq245-nGi94-qJ8YMUvWTZqpJvVMNjkLG91Bi8cYjgdXeYj5bGSJ5S8mWxJl2H-JfrPuqMSs3uMSy9wTM9Olj4M46FPBapPjh35Vahl1nV7ptoamTt0PI8oorpP7e9RwRIEZwu_0RqzLxJeT6-w4lH2VSJM6pY7III_SzsHZZj5mRnNjNBwTU59UWTuxh-0wH6RowTHJYYBA3P3xieuFRKpqZVLSyQtxtTvxbDfsx6LUyVhv5fuNck-HjwzURUEDEsQUrYX2VaSYCPJRZUEQhDZbvEZFvE_Y8EFmft700dEL5Ryo1Kh6fKaT7JeJ_mrRIl7_z6EQqNBsOBdSVCWeekBEuykQRUjOzfesE2-DTgDsr0pLquRDl-Svmw5bdoEs3SbtmTDfoUMVF3YZKppHifFdaQjICRtmxFCLjNQy_iUmyTenxgKj-qaUNK8mPhWwQ5FsR0R-ymWXbyq_8t35Bb5IUoCNiK5m96BLDRoYuXsJL5JiMQ)__**

**__[> > We’re going to RETAKE THE HOUSE MAJORITY! <<](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=efe55b7f38e84b929a3327e7488ac24e&_e=8x3fHG06NtVMceFq245-nGi94-qJ8YMUvWTZqpJvVMNjkLG91Bi8cYjgdXeYj5bGSJ5S8mWxJl2H-JfrPuqMSs3uMSy9wTM9Olj4M46FPBapPjh35Vahl1nV7ptoamTt0PI8oorpP7e9RwRIEZwu_0RqzLxJeT6-w4lH2VSJM6pY7III_SzsHZZj5mRnNjNBwTU59UWTuxh-0wH6RowTHJYYBA3P3xieuFRKpqZVLSyQtxtTvxbDfsx6LUyVhv5fuNck-HjwzURUEDEsQUrYX2VaSYCPJRZUEQhDZbvEZFt_UYOYznWsC7YHpbRugIS2-Niuiydtl_uL4pqB0MNmtktJKos4svHmnO7PBF3dKVi-pd8UCIaXwrdwNDZlc5uKYLQ7iRTulZYXonCK_ksO05GF4NSuNKZQc1jthkSWHOYlshPmkFQm7CNh43DV3hUWHsnJYj67qGIUmLHk_70mv9vL4SxhgFpi_CQiMIImWuWayZa78zk3pIjeqdeVhAgw)__**

**__[> > We’re going to FIGHT FOR AMERICAN SMALL BUSINESSES! <<](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=efe55b7f38e84b929a3327e7488ac24e&_e=8x3fHG06NtVMceFq245-nGi94-qJ8YMUvWTZqpJvVMNjkLG91Bi8cYjgdXeYj5bGSJ5S8mWxJl2H-JfrPuqMSs3uMSy9wTM9Olj4M46FPBapPjh35Vahl1nV7ptoamTt0PI8oorpP7e9RwRIEZwu_0RqzLxJeT6-w4lH2VSJM6pY7III_SzsHZZj5mRnNjNBwTU59UWTuxh-0wH6RowTHJYYBA3P3xieuFRKpqZVLSyQtxtTvxbDfsx6LUyVhv5fuNck-HjwzURUEDEsQUrYX2VaSYCPJRZUEQhDZbvEZFtri5ABzfMwWsHQhPaV_56XpIzvAT3qLBzHv2KuUkg8LauXohSsQ9Nlk7pGLfxVDrMuq1l80w0xRLhO7hwJe0HAIcbCxu-aDLwIjdL8AjBQVfdZupQ6El_jOhqxNaGApl2x_pr5ZmuU4MxZodAFAJRjZYpGfCMd0KhYqU__d8gqbeeQI4WPlRzhn2yW8hnCQ7zGCko2r0YVwx0hFLVziYk7)__**

Peter, small businesses will never recover from these lockdowns while Democrats still control Congress. We must support local, main street-focused candidates who prioritize fighting for small businesses!

That’s why I put together the **🚨 MAIN STREET DEFENSE FUND 🚨** to support Republicans who will stand up for our small businesses and against this anti-small business agenda! _**[Help Take Back the Majority and Support Republicans who will stand up for Main Street in Congress!](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=efe55b7f38e84b929a3327e7488ac24e&_e=8x3fHG06NtVMceFq245-nGi94-qJ8YMUvWTZqpJvVMNjkLG91Bi8cYjgdXeYj5bGSJ5S8mWxJl2H-JfrPuqMSs3uMSy9wTM9Olj4M46FPBapPjh35Vahl1nV7ptoamTt0PI8oorpP7e9RwRIEZwu_0RqzLxJeT6-w4lH2VSJM6pY7III_SzsHZZj5mRnNjNBwTU59UWTuxh-0wH6RowTHJYYBA3P3xieuFRKpqZVLSyQtxtTvxbDfsx6LUyVhv5fuNck-HjwzURUEDEsQUrYX2VaSYCPJRZUEQhDZbvEZFsddUfmSd9_gS-n6oxMgLr-XS8zxo_3DEodDgLb8k1Qf7TwhoxVMQz9iTmge2dQPjzsshduVa-C5jRY2UNEHRrXgX85jndAhdzBNQqRYy_C5z2DC9_FR5PHnKOwU6RDEofcea1jd-f5meG9kxUp5WyUIZkiDJep2EZT3qyyi9K5ffOWCTBIDPCdbELTyP3hdzsocmvKyuMvtBHWJ-EJv_sh)**_

name: RoKhanna.com
subject: A quick look back on what our movement has accomplished
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
With support from donors like you, we’ve been able to accomplish some amazing things over the years. But our progressive movement isn’t slowing down anytime soon – and neither is Ro.
#
As we get closer and closer to the end of February – and our end-of-month-goal – we wanted to take a moment to reflect back on just some of the work your support has helped us accomplish:
📚 As a first-term Congressman, **Ro co-sponsored Senator Bernie Sanders' bill, the College for All Act,** which would make public four-year colleges and universities affordable for all. ✊ Our movement has only gotten stronger around progressive legislation like **a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and a $15 minimum wage.** Ro is proud to support these bills. 💻 **Ro introduced the Internet Bill of Rights** in collaboration with some of the biggest think tanks and companies in Silicon Valley, which establishes the 10 principles covering privacy, data, and net neutrality. 🇺🇸 **Ro’s bill the VALOR Act was signed into law in 2017,** creating a more efficient process for businesses to hire and train veterans for 21st century jobs. 🕹 **Over 37,000 folks from around the country signed Ro’s petition after the GameStop controversy,** calling for for an investigation into Robinhood, regulations for short selling, and rules against hedge funds using their power to create a rigged game. 🎉 **Nearly 20,000 grassroots supporters from around the country stepped up last year to chip in whatever they could** to support Ro’s work! Our team is incredibly proud to have such a diverse supporter base, and to see our campaign supported by so many folks with unique lived experiences and backgrounds.
---
**[Will you join our supporters and chip in for the first time today? We need to raise $10,000 by midnight on February 28th.](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/6427?refcode=ema-1661&t=20&akid=1661%2E946728%2Eat4fxr)**
**[Contribute](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/6427?refcode=em-1661&amounts=&t=21&akid=1661%2E946728%2Eat4fxr)**
With support from donors like you, we’ve been able to accomplish some amazing things over the years. But our progressive movement isn’t slowing down anytime soon – and neither is Ro.
If we’re going to advance our agenda to fight for student debt relief, a Green New Deal, COVID-19 relief for families, Medicare for All and more, we need your support.
**[Please chip in what you can today to help us reach our end-of-month goal before February ends.](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/6427?refcode=ema-1661&t=22&akid=1661%2E946728%2Eat4fxr)**
Together,
Team Ro

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ro-khanna?refcode=emfooter20210227&t=23&refcode2=1661_946728_at4fxr&akid=1661%2E946728%2Eat4fxr)** | [](https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA) | [](https://twitter.com/RoKhanna)
---|---|---
Paid for by Ro for Congress
PO Box 3513, Santa Clara, CA 95051
Email us: [info@rokhanna.com](mailto:info@rokhanna.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we stay in touch with you, but if you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.rokhanna.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=1661%2E946728%2Eat4fxr).

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Take Action: Stop Biden’s Radicals and the sinister HR1
body:
| |
---
Thank you for being a supporter of Tea Party Patriots Action. You are our activists, donors, members, and supporters who care about personal freedom, economic freedom, and a debt free future.

In January, we asked you what you want to see Tea Party Patriots Action do during the next two years, and what areas we could improve. We heard from thousands of you. In the last few weeks, we read your feedback, considered the issues that concern you the most, and used your suggestions to form our plans for 2021–2022.

**For 2022, our goal is to increase the number of Americans who will act on, stand for, and cast votes based on a legislative agenda that puts America first, values personal freedom and economic freedom, and supports free markets rather than socialist policies.**

To achieve the goal, **[with your feedback](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDU4LWViNzc2NzJiZDYxZjRjNjc5M2FiMTRkYWFjNThlZGM3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvMjAyMS0yMDIyLWFjdGlvbi1wbGFucy8_bWlkPTQzNDI5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=_pNJbEveES89mhdnln-dFw)** , we will:
**1\. Recruit, educate, and equip concerned citizens to become engaged activists**
1. Launch an educational series that explains how individual concerned citizens can move up a ladder of activist engagement.
2. Assist supporters in organizing, engaging, and building relationships at the local level to educate and inform others of the importance of our values and issues.
3. As we grow our engaged activists and grassroots leaders, weekly action items will gradually focus more on neighborhood and precinct organizing efforts.
_NOTE: Due to COVID and various state and local restrictions, we will work on educating individuals more than on building specific local groups._

**2\. Educate and engage to ensure each and every legal vote is counted – no more, no less**
_To ensure Americans have hope for the future and faith they can make a difference in the political process in this country, we must have faith in the outcome of elections, regardless of who wins or loses._
1. Work at a state level to educate on necessary changes to improve election integrity, and, where appropriate, give action items to help enact those changes legislatively.
2. Expand poll watcher training program to recruit, train, and deploy poll workers, poll watchers, and public observers in key states for early voting and Election Day voting.
3. Stand for safeguards to prevent election fraud, including voter id, increased checks and balances on mail-in voting, and voter registration process.
4. Oppose HR 1, which we refer to as the For Politicians Act.

**3\. Educate often and engage on national issues that are important to our cause**
_To persuade opinion effectively and answer questions from those we want to influence, we must understand why we support or oppose an issue, bill, or regulation. To elevate the importance of an issue with the public, from time to time we must take coordinated action._
1. Focus educational efforts on the following foundational issues: election integrity (as mentioned above), free speech, healthcare freedom, rule of law, border security, economic freedom, free markets and capitalism, and constitutional freedoms versus socialism.
2. Educational methods include documentaries, webpages, short videos, video interviews with experts, social media memes, webinars, and emails.
3. Engage on legislative issues related to the foundational issues with coordinated calls to action to melt phone lines, write letters to editor, wave signs, etc.
4. Premiere and launch two documentaries to educate about free markets versus socialism.
5. Revamp, rebrand, and relaunch weekly livestream and podcast to better educate and inform our supporters and activists.
6. Expand ThePatriotProject.com news website.

**4\. Activate base to get out the vote based on our values in 2022**
1. Activists will send handwritten, personalized postcards and letters to voters in the general election cycle in 2022. In 2022, our goal is 3 million personalized voter-to-voter postcards and 750,000 personal letters to voters.
2. Send 10 million text messages and phone calls to voters.

clean_body: | | Thank you for being a supporter of Tea Party Patriots Action. You are our activists, donors, members, and supporters who care about personal freedom, economic freedom, and a debt free future. In January, we asked you what you want to see Tea Party Patriots Action do during the next two years, and what areas we could improve. We heard from thousands of you. In the last few weeks, we read your feedback, considered the issues that concern you the most, and used your suggestions to form our plans for 2021–2022. For 2022, our goal is to increase the number of Americans who will act on, stand for, and cast votes based on a legislative agenda that puts America first, values personal freedom and economic freedom, and supports free markets rather than socialist policies. To achieve the goal, , we will: 1\. Recruit, educate, and equip concerned citizens to become engaged activists 1. Launch an educational series that explains how individual concerned citizens can move up a ladder of activist engagement. 2. Assist supporters in organizing, engaging, and building relationships at the local level to educate and inform others of the importance of our values and issues. 3. As we grow our engaged activists and grassroots leaders, weekly action items will gradually focus more on neighborhood and precinct organizing efforts. NOTE: Due to COVID and various state and local restrictions, we will work on educating individuals more than on building specific local groups. 2\. Educate and engage to ensure each and every legal vote is counted – no more, no less To ensure Americans have hope for the future and faith they can make a difference in the political process in this country, we must have faith in the outcome of elections, regardless of who wins or loses. 1. Work at a state level to educate on necessary changes to improve election integrity, and, where appropriate, give action items to help enact those changes legislatively. 2. Expand poll watcher training program to recruit, train, and deploy poll workers, poll watchers, and public observers in key states for early voting and Election Day voting. 3. Stand for safeguards to prevent election fraud, including voter id, increased checks and balances on mail-in voting, and voter registration process. 4. Oppose HR 1, which we refer to as the For Politicians Act. 3\. Educate often and engage on national issues that are important to our cause To persuade opinion effectively and answer questions from those we want to influence, we must understand why we support or oppose an issue, bill, or regulation. To elevate the importance of an issue with the public, from time to time we must take coordinated action. 1. Focus educational efforts on the following foundational issues: election integrity (as mentioned above), free speech, healthcare freedom, rule of law, border security, economic freedom, free markets and capitalism, and constitutional freedoms versus socialism. 2. Educational methods include documentaries, webpages, short videos, video interviews with experts, social media memes, webinars, and emails. 3. Engage on legislative issues related to the foundational issues with coordinated calls to action to melt phone lines, write letters to editor, wave signs, etc. 4. Premiere and launch two documentaries to educate about free markets versus socialism. 5. Revamp, rebrand, and relaunch weekly livestream and podcast to better educate and inform our supporters and activists. 6. Expand ThePatriotProject.com news website. 4\. Activate base to get out the vote based on our values in 2022 1. Activists will send handwritten, personalized postcards and letters to voters in the general election cycle in 2022. In 2022, our goal is 3 million personalized voter-to-voter postcards and 750,000 personal letters to voters. 2. Send 10 million text messages and phone calls to voters. to give your feedback on the broad action plans for 2021 and 2022. In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. © 2020 80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003 |

name: Senate GOP
subject: Short month, same goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | Here is the situation, Friend.

February is a short month; but Marco Rubio's budget is the same. And his End of the Month deadline is in **_ONE DAY_**.

Being up for re-election in a cycle where over **$250 million** was spent in Florida last year alone, Marco and his team cannot afford to take a day off, Friend.

Marco is at the top of Chuck Schumer's list of Senators he would most like to see gone, and it is up to grassroots conservatives, like you, to put a stop to this. Time is running out and we need to know, **will you do your part to put a stop to this?**
---

_**[<<< PUT A STOP TO SCHUMER AND THE LEFT >>>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eEi3nt2omCR3Dg2bVkGjyfanjv-9QT5Se8_2cbk2VNRgPNdnoPaL4yLKtfaBN2CUxnP9T-DNgvmqIQRQ6OwJN47gQr4XAv6zSBp3E1yIsBrPjAGdVqSCwixHrC09s3_8VqraLc3J7PljytyMCeGt4_-35saXc6uzADuz1UxaN_-ksAbXX9dojVKXd0pdBVFWE3OVt4IRdC3elnI2oR_YqlD3F6aoUIqYW4xFB8kx5vfihlEB52wurY8vJETMVIPlJ1ZxC8EjuRTvN-ZPTnxWTf7K9HdONa-Yrwz5Xk7_b1ryPBKqRuOFPiLHTDUxy2wNQR1T46S9LdaQoqmLt7YrumqLKGH9jzY1P3WrPUuN8zQ_Np0LqoSPGcR8qhJcogqR7zNBDg1NALHf3kFZbeh6hVwDpZ0kwLeZ&c=A7MlXlFQ79Fwyif4KqKl_jEioCCYrpAKCzN6Bln8BVeyYhLg8Juc0Q==&ch=G-vFSTEMk9-cJpsLmw2-rkXy9Wk9CgceBrf2VJ8UnL84ADm3FWmn2g== "<<< PUT A STOP TO SCHUMER AND THE LEFT>>>")**_

---
Without Marco in the Senate, we will lose one of the strongest and most powerful conservative voices. To the Left, they will see it as:
**An opportunity for more censorship
An opportunity for higher taxes
An opportunity to eliminate more jobs
An opportunity for more radical Biden Cabinet nominees**

name: Josh Hawley
subject: I'll keep this brief --
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
I know you have received several messages from me and my team, so I'll keep this brief. Peter, I know you have received several messages from me and my team, so I’ll keep this brief. Joe Biden has been in office for one month, and he has already opened our borders, which will create a total mess for our country.
**This is unacceptable.**

We need to act now if we’re going to prevent a surge of illegal immigration the likes of which this country has never seen.

That work is going to take a strong grassroots team that is up for the challenge. Republican Senators like me will continue to fight against Joe Biden and his liberal allies like Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer, **but we need help from American Patriots like you! **

Please help my team send Joe Biden a message **TODAY** by donating ahead of our February deadline.

subject: Pssst, We Know How to Stop the Pelosi/Biden Agenda!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/aacd2833e587/pssst-we-know-how-to-stop-the-pelosibiden-agenda?e=24057c0240)
---
|
---
[Team Morrisey is building momentum and gaining strength to fight one-party rule in D.C. which is passing disastrous bills right and left. Republican attorneys general have a unique means to fight the far-left Congress and President Biden. We are seeking to raise an additional $3,100 to help meet our End of Month Goal. Generous allies will match donations for today only. Support Team Morrisey today with $35, $50, or even $100 to help us crush our goal!](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=d1184aa952&e=24057c0240)
|
---
Dear Peter:One-party Democratic rule in D.C. is already an unmitigated disaster.The House Democrats just passed a massive stimulus bill filled with pork. For example, there’s **$40 MILLION extra for a subway in SPEAKER PELOSI’S district. MAJORITY LEADER SCHUMER delivers $5.6 BILLION to New York City for a BAILOUT SLUSH FUND to pay for financial mismanagement.** Meanwhile, a small percentage of dollars are actually spent on Covid-public health matters.**Outrageous!** Right now, there is only **ONE WAY to FIGHT BACK.** The far-left controls the House and the Senate, making it very hard for Republicans in Congress to win any big fight.**You know who can win?** Republican attorneys general and West Virginia Attorney General Patrick Morrisey.**We’re outside the D.C. power structure and have the ability to go to Court to stop some of President Biden’s and Speaker Pelosi’s top initiatives.** We’ll win the same way Morrisey stopped Obama’s so-called Clean Power Plan: **by BUILDING MASSIVE LEGAL AND GRASSROOTS COALITIONS to advance conservative values.** Help us get STRONGER TODAY and meet our End of Month Goals!**We’re $3,100 short and MUST MAKE PROGRESS this weekend.** Some of our allies will match donations that go toward fighting against one-party rule.
[](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=af6bbaed11&e=24057c0240)
Donate $35, $50, or even $100 today. We need your help to educate people about these nasty pork projects coming from the D.C. special interests.
| [Donate $100 = $200 IMPACT](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=fc87e79ac7&e=24057c0240)

Sincerely,Team Morrisey
